title: andryala dentata
intro: Andryala dentata, also known as the tooth-leaved andryala or tooth-leaved hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for digestive issues and as a diuretic. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving liver function, due to its content of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. Andryala dentata is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
